TFI TRANS

Sort by
Spare VINs 0
Existing SuperDispatch shipments found by the loadboard scan (it runs as part of a Run, matching the Excel's origin/dest zips). Ones whose exact addresses match a staged route show in that route's focused view — yellow ring if posted, green if accepted — where you can drag your to-be VINs onto them to stage a consolidation.

SuperDispatch

Dispatcher profiles

Assign each dispatcher a phone (fills the <dispatcher> text in the load-board and order instructions) and the pickup states they pull from the Excel — e.g. VA MD GA FL. Leave states blank for no filter.

Clear board

Deletes the current board (all Excel VINs), every SuperDispatch match, and all staged consolidations/connections — back to a blank slate. Your dispatcher profile and credentials are kept. (The Excel + button does this too when you load a new sheet.)

Test post (LIVE)

Posts the topmost shipment on the board to SuperDispatch as a single real order (production) — the same one-shipment live test, tucked away here.

One-time sign-in

Opens Chrome on the shared login profile at both the Tesla Vendor Portal and SuperDispatch so you can sign in once. Your password is typed into each site's own page — it is never stored by this app. Cookies persist for future runs.
